summary: As a product owner, I'd like to express work in terms of actual user problems, aka User Stories, and place them in the backlog >> Try creating a new story with the "+ Create Issue" button (top right of screen)
description_preview:
When you click "+ Create Issue" you will be asked for the correct project (select "Sample Scrum Project") and Issue Type (select "Story").

*About User Stories*

The Scrum methodology drops traditional software requirement statements in favour of real world problems expressed as User Stories. Stories describe the task a particular user is trying to achieve and its value. They are typically of the form "As a (role) I want (something) so that (benefit)". This approach focuses the team on the core ...
